proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009=0`.
Cell lines with `feature_022=1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022=0`.
Cell lines with `feature_024=1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024=0`.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_BRAF in feature_009=1 versus all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_BRAF` was much more negative in `feature_009=1` lines: mean -0.8047 vs -0.2495 in others (n=5574).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_EGFR in feature_022=1 versus all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_EGFR` was more negative in `feature_022=1` lines: mean -0.6010 vs -0.2524 in others (n=3880).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_ERBB2 in feature_024=1 versus all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_ERBB2` was more negative in `feature_024=1` lines: mean -0.6856 vs -0.2535 in others (n=4890).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_014=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014=0`.
Cell lines with `feature_027=1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027=0`.
Cell lines with `feature_018=1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `feature_018=0`.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KRAS in feature_014=1 versus all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KRAS` was strongly more negative in `feature_014=1` lines: mean -0.5594 vs -0.2520 in others (n=11842).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_RIT1 in feature_027=1 versus all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_RIT1` was more negative in `feature_027=1` lines: mean -0.3527 vs -0.2572 in others (n=4560).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_RPL11 in feature_018=1 versus all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_RPL11` was more negative in `feature_018=1` lines: mean -0.3614 vs -0.2523 in others (n=8055).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011=skin` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than non-skin cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_022=1` and `feature_011=brain` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_024=1` and `feature_011=breast` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_014=1` and `feature_011=pancreatic` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.code: Lineage-stratified comparison for dependency_BRAF by feature_011 category.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_011=skin` lines had more negative `dependency_BRAF` than other lines: mean -0.4721 vs -0.2938 (n=4935).

analyses.code: Two-predicate subgroup comparison for feature_022=1 and feature_011=brain.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_022=1 & feature_011=brain` subgroup had more negative `dependency_EGFR`: mean -0.6117 vs -0.2740 in others (n=815).

analyses.code: Two-predicate subgroup comparison for feature_024=1 and feature_011=breast.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_024=1 & feature_011=breast` subgroup had more negative `dependency_ERBB2`: mean -0.7027 vs -0.2864 in others (n=1121).

analyses.code: Two-predicate subgroup comparison for feature_014=1 and feature_011=pancreatic.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_014=1 & feature_011=pancreatic` subgroup had more negative `dependency_KRAS`: mean -0.5591 vs -0.3103 in others (n=2913).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011=colorectal` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_035=1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `feature_035=0`.
Cell lines with `feature_020=1` have less negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `feature_020=0`, suppressing KIF18A dependency.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KIF18A for feature_011=colorectal versus all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_011=colorectal` lines had much more negative `dependency_KIF18A`: mean -0.7204 vs -0.2524 in others (n=5816).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KIF18A for feature_035=1 versus all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_035=1` lines had more negative `dependency_KIF18A`: mean -0.5447 vs -0.2526 in others (n=9285).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KIF18A for feature_020=1 versus all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_020=1` lines had less negative `dependency_KIF18A`: mean -0.2491 vs -0.3158 in others (n=6749), consistent with suppression.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011=colorectal`, `feature_035=1`, and `feature_020=0` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_011=colorectal`, `feature_028>=1.427` (top decile), `feature_035=1`, and `feature_020=0` have the most negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores.
Among `feature_011=colorectal`, `feature_028>=1.427`, and `feature_020=0` cell lines, `feature_035=0` abolishes the more-negative `dependency_KIF18A` pattern.

analyses.code: Three-predicate subgroup comparison for feature_011=colorectal, feature_035=1, feature_020=0.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_011=colorectal & feature_035=1 & feature_020=0` subgroup had strongly more negative `dependency_KIF18A`: mean -1.0922 vs -0.2527 in others (n=3226).

analyses.code: Four-predicate subgroup comparison for feature_011=colorectal, feature_028>=1.427, feature_035=1, feature_020=0.
analyses.result_summary: Adding high `feature_028` identified the strongest KIF18A-dependent subgroup: mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.3952 vs -0.2678 in others (n=1732).

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for feature_011=colorectal, feature_028>=1.427, feature_035=0, feature_020=0.
analyses.result_summary: When `feature_035=0`, the high-`feature_028`, `feature_020=0` colorectal subgroup did not show stronger KIF18A dependency: mean -0.2866 vs -0.3069 in others (n=280).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_016>=1.088` (top decile) have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_016>=1.088` (top decile) and `feature_026>=1.153` (top decile) have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_016>=1.088` (top decile) and `feature_023>=6.33` (top decile) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.code: Top-decile threshold comparison for dependency_POLR2A by feature_016.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_016>=1.088` lines had more negative `dependency_POLR2A`: mean -0.5281 vs -0.4070 in others (n=5002).

analyses.code: Two-threshold subgroup comparison for dependency_TMED10 by feature_016 and feature_026.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_016>=1.088 & feature_026>=1.153` subgroup had more negative `dependency_TMED10`: mean -0.3424 vs -0.2531 in others (n=490).

analyses.code: Two-threshold subgroup comparison for dependency_DHX9 by feature_016 and feature_023.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_016>=1.088 & feature_023>=6.33` subgroup had more negative `dependency_DHX9`: mean -0.4174 vs -0.3327 in others (n=571).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_003>=1.003` (top decile) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_003>=1.003` (top decile) and `feature_016>=1.088` (top decile) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_027=1` and `feature_011=brain` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.code: Top-decile threshold comparison for dependency_RPL11 by feature_003.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_003>=1.003` lines had more negative `dependency_RPL11`: mean -0.3831 vs -0.2573 in others (n=5011).

analyses.code: Two-threshold subgroup comparison for dependency_RPL11 by feature_003 and feature_016.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_003>=1.003 & feature_016>=1.088` subgroup had more negative `dependency_RPL11`: mean -0.4193 vs -0.2677 in others (n=717).

analyses.code: Two-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_RIT1 by feature_027 and feature_011.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_027=1 & feature_011=brain` subgroup had more negative `dependency_RIT1`: mean -0.4047 vs -0.2650 in others (n=329).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic BRAF heterogeneity search will still identify `feature_009=1` as the dominant `dependency_BRAF` subgroup, with little added gain from extra predicates.
A systematic EGFR heterogeneity search will identify `feature_022=1` plus `feature_016>=1.088` as a more-negative `dependency_EGFR` subgroup.
A systematic ERBB2 heterogeneity search will identify `feature_024=1`, `feature_011=breast`, and `feature_013>=0.519` as a more-negative `dependency_ERBB2` subgroup.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 120 single predicates plus pair and triple intersections for dependency_BRAF.
analyses.result_summary: The systematic search confirmed `feature_009=1` as the dominant BRAF subgroup. The best broad pair, `feature_009=1 & feature_030=0`, had mean -0.8055 vs -0.2540 in others (n=5200), similar to `feature_009=1` alone.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 120 single predicates plus pair and triple intersections for dependency_EGFR.
analyses.result_summary: The search identified `feature_022=1 & feature_016>=1.088` as a more-negative EGFR subgroup: mean -0.6474 vs -0.2765 in others (n=393).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 120 single predicates plus pair and triple intersections for dependency_ERBB2.
analyses.result_summary: The search identified `feature_024=1 & feature_011=breast & feature_013>=0.519` as a more-negative ERBB2 subgroup: mean -0.7597 vs -0.2930 in others (n=292).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic KRAS heterogeneity search will identify `feature_014=1`, `feature_016>=1.088`, and `feature_008=1` as a more-negative `dependency_KRAS` subgroup.
A systematic RIT1 heterogeneity search will identify `feature_027=1`, `feature_011=brain`, and `feature_008=0` as a more-negative `dependency_RIT1` subgroup.
A systematic RPL11 heterogeneity search will identify `feature_003>=1.003`, `feature_016>=0.964`, and `feature_011=pancreatic` as a more-negative `dependency_RPL11` subgroup.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 120 single predicates plus pair and triple intersections for dependency_KRAS.
analyses.result_summary: The search identified `feature_014=1 & feature_016>=1.088 & feature_008=1` as a more-negative KRAS subgroup: mean -0.6313 vs -0.3233 in others (n=235).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 120 single predicates plus pair and triple intersections for dependency_RIT1.
analyses.result_summary: The search identified `feature_027=1 & feature_011=brain & feature_008=0` as a more-negative RIT1 subgroup: mean -0.4315 vs -0.2651 in others (n=256).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 120 single predicates plus pair and triple intersections for dependency_RPL11.
analyses.result_summary: The search identified `feature_003>=1.003 & feature_016>=0.964 & feature_011=pancreatic` as a more-negative RPL11 subgroup: mean -0.4671 vs -0.2692 in others (n=173).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic TMED10 heterogeneity search will identify `feature_016>=1.088` and `feature_026>=1.153` as a more-negative `dependency_TMED10` subgroup.
A systematic DHX9 heterogeneity search will identify `feature_016>=0.964`, `feature_023>=5.669`, and `feature_011=prostate` as a more-negative `dependency_DHX9` subgroup.
A systematic POLR2A heterogeneity search will identify `feature_016>=1.088`, `feature_010=adenocarcinoma`, and `feature_003>=0.428` as a more-negative `dependency_POLR2A` subgroup.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 120 single predicates plus pair and triple intersections for dependency_TMED10.
analyses.result_summary: The search identified `feature_016>=1.088 & feature_026>=1.153` as the clearest TMED10 subgroup: mean -0.3424 vs -0.2531 in others (n=490).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 120 single predicates plus pair and triple intersections for dependency_DHX9.
analyses.result_summary: The search identified `feature_016>=0.964 & feature_023>=5.669 & feature_011=prostate` as a more-negative DHX9 subgroup: mean -0.4565 vs -0.3333 in others (n=169).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 120 single predicates plus pair and triple intersections for dependency_POLR2A.
analyses.result_summary: The search identified `feature_016>=1.088 & feature_010=adenocarcinoma & feature_003>=0.428` as a more-negative POLR2A subgroup: mean -0.6004 vs -0.4185 in others (n=170).
